message:
refactor(fs): improve async filesystem operations

Filesystem modules:
- buf_reader.rs, buf_writer.rs: Better buffered file IO
- dir.rs: Improved directory operations
- file.rs: Enhanced async File implementation
- open_options.rs: Better file opening configuration
- path_ops.rs: Improved path utilities
- read_dir.rs: Better directory reading with cancel-safety

All filesystem operations now properly integrate with asupersync's
capability system and provide proper cleanup guarantees.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
